data.title: On the first day of the implementation of the US reciprocal tariffs, European stocks opened with a collective decline
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that European stock indexes fell more than 3% at the opening, the European Stoxx 50 index fell more than 3%, the German DAX index fell 3%, the British FTSE 100 index fell 2%, the French CAC40 index fell 2%, and the Italian FTSE MIB index fell 3.4%. The US's 20% reciprocal tariff on the EU officially took effect today. (Jinshi)

data.title: Florida's Bitcoin Reserve Bill Set for Public Hearing
data.description: According to Odaily, the Florida Bitcoin Reserve Bill HB 487 is scheduled for a public hearing this Thursday, April 10, in the Insurance and Banking Subcommittee. This marks the first public hearing on the Bitcoin Reserve Bill in Florida since its introduction two months ago.

data.title: Markets fully price in 25bps ECB rate cut in April
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Eurozone money markets are fully pricing in a 25 basis point rate cut by the European Central Bank in April, with data showing an 85% chance of a rate cut by the European Central Bank on Tuesday. (Jinshi)

data.title: Binance will delist multiple spot trading pairs on April 11
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will delist ACT/BRL, ALPHA/BTC, BLUR/BTC, CELR/BTC, PENGU/BNB, POND/BTC, RUNE/BNB and other spot trading pairs at 03:00 (UTC) on April 11, 2025. At the same time, Binance will terminate the spot trading robot service for the above trading pairs. Users can still trade related currencies on other available trading pairs. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Nikkei 225 and KOSPI Indexes Experience Declines
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Nikkei 225 index closed down by 1,298.55 points, a decrease of 3.93%, ending at 31,714.03 points. This follows a gain of over 6% the previous day.

Meanwhile, South Korea's KOSPI index fell by 40.55 points, or 1.74%, closing at 2,293.68 points. This decline comes after a 0.26% increase the day before.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Yield Surge Puts Pressure on Risk Assets
data.description:
According to PANews, the U.S. Treasury market is experiencing a wave of 'basis trade' unwinding, leading to a sharp increase in yields. The 10-year Treasury yield has surged to 4.5%, while the 30-year yield is approaching 5%, exacerbating liquidity concerns and putting significant pressure on risk assets.

Analysis firm Hyblock has issued a warning that if Bitcoin's price falls to the range of $73,800 to $74,400, it could trigger a large-scale liquidation of leveraged long positions, intensifying downward volatility. Hyblock also highlighted that there is support near $70,000, and a breach of this level could lead to further stop-losses and liquidations.

data.title: UXLINK: Full-year net profit expected to reach US$20 million to US$30 million in 2025
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News UXLINK official X published a statement saying that in the first quarter of 2025, when the market environment was full of challenges, UXLINK not only achieved strong growth, but also recorded solid profits. The UXLINK ecosystem has always been centered on "growth", committed to providing users with a seamless experience, while achieving healthy growth for projects and builders through top infrastructure, tools and traffic support. PMF (Product-Market-Fit) has been successfully verified. As long as the industry maintains its upward momentum, the demand for growth will never fade. The UXLINK ecosystem MVP (Minimum-Viable-Product) has also been fully verified, achieving a net profit of more than 10 million US dollars and entering a positive cycle.
The head of the UXLINK ecosystem said: "It is expected that the full-year net profit in 2025 will reach 20 million to 30 million US dollars. Looking ahead, with the launch of the PAYFi system, the next generation of AI tools, and more innovative projects, UXLINK's profits will usher in explosive growth. We will continue to invest in research and development and strive to become the preferred engine for industry growth."

data.title: Florida Bitcoin Reserve Bill is scheduled for a public hearing this Thursday before the Insurance and Banking Subcommittee
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Bitcoin Laws, Florida's Bitcoin Reserve Bill HB 487 is scheduled to hold a public hearing at the Insurance and Banking Subcommittee this Thursday (April 10). This will be the first public Bitcoin Reserve Bill hearing in Florida since the bill was proposed two months ago.

data.title: XRP to the Moon? Standard Chartered Predicts a 500% Price Surge (Report)
data.description:
The British multinational bank supposedly added its name to the list of companies and people envisioning a solid price increase for XRP in the future.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/xrp-to-the-moon-standard-chartered-predicts-a-500-price-surge-report/

data.title: Federal Reserve Meeting Minutes to Be Released Amid Economic Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, the Federal Reserve is set to release the minutes from its March 19-20 policy meeting at 2 a.m. UTC+8 on Thursday. During this meeting, the Fed decided to maintain the benchmark interest rate within the 4.25%-4.50% range and indicated plans for three rate cuts of 25 basis points each within the year. Following U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement of a global tariff plan on April 2, U.S. stocks experienced a significant decline, prompting several economists to warn of a potential recession this year. In a speech on April 4, Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell adopted a more hawkish tone, cautioning about the highly uncertain outlook and the dual risks of rising unemployment and inflation. Recent futures market data shows that traders have increased their expectations for four rate cuts this year.
